_comment: Build-only tsconfig for design-sync. The converter's esbuild paths plugin reads compilerOptions.paths directly (does NOT follow `extends`), so the repo's `@/*` alias is duplicated inline here. baseUrl `..` makes both aliases resolve from the repo root (this file lives in .design-sync/). The extra `shiki` alias swaps the heavy syntax-highlighter package for a tiny stub so _ds_bundle.js stays under the 5 MB upload cap.
